pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Add scope 'provided' to jakarta.annotation-api dependency to avoid packaging conflicts in Java 21 environments where it might be provided by the container or framework.
Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve compatibility issues between Lombok and MapStruct in newer Java versions.
Add lombok-mapstruct-binding to annotation processor paths to ensure correct processing order and compatibility.
Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag set to the java.version property for proper cross-compilation support in Java 21.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/servic.why_exists: Java 21 enforces stricter serialization checks; without @Serial, the compiler may flag or reject serialVersionUID fields not annotated as serializable members.
